name: LinkedIn Lead Generation and Automation
description: A LinkedIn automation tool that leverages AI to identify and find potential sales leads for users, streamlining outreach and lead generation processes.

inputs.name: target_market_description
inputs.description: Description of the product's target market to guide the AI in lead identification.

inputs.name: user_linkedin_account
inputs.description: Credentials or authenticated session details for accessing the user's LinkedIn account.

inputs.name: automation_parameters
inputs.description: Configuration settings for the automation such as connection request limits, message templates, and timing.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: List of AI-identified potential leads matching the user-defined target market.

outputs.name: automation_report
outputs.description: Summary of automation activities including connection requests sent, messages delivered, and outcomes.

patterns: AI-driven lead identification from descriptive target market input
Automated LinkedIn outreach through configurable messaging templates
Scheduled or rate-limited connection requests to comply with platform constraints
steps: User describes product and target market to the system.
AI processes the description to identify and find matching LinkedIn leads.
User configures automation parameters including message templates and limits.
Tool connects to user's LinkedIn account to initiate outreach.
Automated connection requests and messages are sent to generated lead list.
System tracks and reports engagement and automation outcomes.
use_cases: Sales teams automating lead prospecting on LinkedIn.
Marketers scaling outreach with personalized messaging.
Recruiters sourcing candidates matching specific profiles.
Entrepreneurs building LinkedIn network relevant to their offerings.

prompt_templates.name: lead_finding_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find LinkedIn leads interested in {product_description} targeted to {target_market}.

prompt_templates.name: outreach_message_template
prompt_templates.template: Hi {lead_name}, I thought you might be interested in {product_name} because {personalization_reason}.
